title: Common Causes of Fever in Cattle
author: Dr. Ankit Malik
summary: A field guide to recognising and triaging pyrexia in cattle before it escalates.
body:
Fever in cattle is a sign not a diagnosis. This piece walks through the common infectious and non-infectious causes seen in the field how to take an accurate rectal temperature and when a raised temperature warrants immediate treatment versus watchful monitoring.

Key causes covered include tick-borne disease respiratory infection mastitis and post-calving complications. The goal is a quick decision path you can run at the animal's side.

title: Reading a Vaccination Schedule Properly
author: Dr. Ankit Malik
summary: How to tell whether a herd is actually protected not just vaccinated on paper.
body: A vaccination record only means something if the timing dose and cold chain were all correct. This article explains how to audit a schedule spot gaps in coverage and understand why booster timing matters as much as the first dose.
